UPC_E - Static variable in interface com.pax.poslink.peripheries.ScanCodeFormat
 
UpdateBlockNo - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Specifies number of block to which operation result will write.
There are always two purses in M1 card: main purse and backup purse, in order to resume when abnormal error occurs in purse operation.
UpdateID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUpdate
Service update ID
UpdateOperation - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUpdate
Provide update operations for application services
UpdatePayload - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUpdate
Details of service updates
UpdateResource - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
This is used to communicate with POS Service to update resource files of BroadPOS.

Upload - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
the upload flag, the value is as below:
uploadLog(String[]) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
Call POSLink to tell terminal to upload terminal logs and then POSLink upload POSLink log itself.
UploadMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
SAF Uploading mode.
UploadResult - Class in com.pax.poslink.entity
The Result of AbstractPosLink.uploadLog(String[]).

UrlMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.ApplePayVAS
0 - Full VAS Mode
1 - URL mode

UserData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The Data needs Encryption or Decryption:
The length is less than 1024 bytes and hex string is 2048.

Deprecated.
Also called “Generic ID” or “Unencrypted ID Number”.
